title: Plan production for the whole business
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan production for the whole business demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review and confirm the organisation business goals and vision

pcs.text: Compare the organisation business goals and vision against actual business activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare the organisation business goals and vision against actual business activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare the organisation business goals and vision against actual business activities.
